message:
fix(channel): require &mut self for oneshot Receiver::recv

Change recv() signature from &self to &mut self to prevent aliased
concurrent polling of the same receiver, which could lead to lost
wakeups if two futures race on the same channel.

- oneshot.rs: RecvFuture now holds &'a mut Receiver<T> instead of
  &'a Receiver<T>; recv() takes &'a mut self
- session.rs: update tracked_oneshot test bindings to mut rx
- gen_server.rs: update both GenServerHandle::call and
  GenServerRef::call to bind reply_rx as mut
- e2e_messaging.rs, runtime_e2e.rs: update test bindings to mut rx

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
